title: Guide to methodology for drink-drive statistics
body: " In 2025, there was a change to the methodology which caused slight changes to estimates. More details can be found in the methodology note.   This guide describes the methodology used in the production of the statistic included in the publication “Reported road casualties in Great Britain involving illegal alcohol levels”.  The guide covers:   drink-drive legal limits and definitions data sources completeness of data and reliability of drink drive estimates adjustments to account for missing data uncertainty in the statistics and how it’s communicated timeliness of the statistics   Further information on the drink-drive methodology can be addressed to the road safety statistics team via the contact details below.   Road safety statistics     Email roadacc.stats@dft.gov.uk        "
